title: Adverse-Selection Best-Execution Scorecard
notes: Red / G5 adversarial. Reference is portable to all five engines (window functions only; no timestamp arithmetic, no string parsing). The markout horizon is the next valid quote strictly after the fill (rank+1 in the same event stream), which keeps it engine-portable while still exercising a forward as-of and the missing-future-quote guard. naive/1_null_sector_dropped and naive/4_correlated_dual_asof_tle match the reference on the small mild visible sample (no NULL sectors exist below 13 instruments; the tiny input never times out); they fail on the hidden red fixture as WA and TLE respectively. naive/2 and naive/3 already diverge on the visible sample. Sector percentiles are single-member (=0) on the sample and only become meaningful at red scale (~82 names per sector).
